description_long: This is a pair of low-top casual sneakers featuring a light gray suede-like upper with three prominent pink stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The shoes have white midsoles with a subtle pink accent line running along the edge, and the outsoles appear to be made of textured white rubber for grip. The tongue of each shoe displays a blue patch with a red Adidas trefoil logo and text, adding a pop of color and brand identity. The lacing system uses white laces threaded through metallic eyelets, and the interior lining is a darker gray, providing contrast. The overall design is sporty yet stylish, suitable for urban environments and casual wear. The shoes appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of light gray Adidas sneakers with pink stripes, white midsoles, and blue logo patches on the tongues. The shoes feature white laces, metallic eyelets, and a sporty, casual design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes with white laces, blue Adidas logo patches on the tongues, and the rounded toe caps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three pink stripes, white midsole with pink accent, and the overall low-top profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel counters, subtle stitching details, and the slightly textured white outsoles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with three pink stripes and the clean, smooth upper surface.
attribute_logo: Blue Adidas trefoil logo with red text on the tongue patch of each shoe
